subTitle:
A jack-of-all trades, the wily barber Figaro has a scheme for anything. Moved by the
troubles of two young lovers, Figaro pulls out his bag of tricks to aid them. See Rossini’s exuberant comedy in this flamenco-inspired production, featuring some of the most joyful music in all of opera.
name: The Barber of Seville
thumbnailAltText: The Barber of Seville  illustration by Brian Stauffer
synopsis:
A jack-of-all trades, the wily barber Figaro has a scheme for anything. Moved by the
troubles of two young lovers, Figaro pulls out his bag of tricks to aid them. See Rossini’s exuberant comedy in this flamenco-inspired production, featuring some of the most joyful music in all of opera.

subTitle: Begin the evening watching part of Rossini’s The Barber of Seville on stage. Then, immerse yourself in the flamenco world of the opera in a transformed Opera House. This one-night-only opera and party experience is a unique evening you’ll be telling stories about for years.
name: Barber of Seville Encounter
synopsis: Begin the evening watching part of Rossini’s The Barber of Seville on stage. Then, immerse yourself in the flamenco world of the opera in a transformed Opera House. This one-night-only opera and party experience is a unique evening you’ll be telling stories about for years.

subTitle: In a brutal world where revenge is enacted with the axe, Elektra is consumed by her grief and seeks vengeance against her mother. Justice must be served in this taut psychological thriller in which the past and present become one, considered Strauss’ expressionist masterpiece.
name: Elektra
synopsis: In a brutal world where revenge is enacted with the axe, Elektra is consumed by her grief and seeks vengeance against her mother. Justice must be served in this taut psychological thriller in which the past and present become one, considered Strauss’ expressionist masterpiece.

subTitle: Kick off 2026 San Francisco Pride weekend with San Francisco Opera! The San Francisco Opera Orchestra and featured artists will perform a high-energy concert celebrating LGBTQIA+ composers, performers, anthems, and so much more!
name: Pride Concert
synopsis: Kick off 2026 San Francisco Pride weekend with San Francisco Opera! The San Francisco Opera Orchestra and featured artists will perform a high-energy concert celebrating LGBTQIA+ composers, performers, anthems, and so much more!

subTitle: Since 1983, these recitals have featured renowned Merola alumni and have also been instrumental in launching the careers of internationally acclaimed artists.
name: Schwabacher Recital
synopsis: Since 1983, these recitals have featured renowned Merola alumni and have also been instrumental in launching the careers of internationally acclaimed artists.

subTitle: Music Director Eun Sun Kim leads the San Francisco Opera Orchestra in an afternoon of duets, arias, and more, performed by stars from San Francisco Opera’s 2026–27 Season.
name: Opera in the Park
thumbnailAltText: Opera in the Park view of stage from the lawn
synopsis: Music Director Eun Sun Kim leads the San Francisco Opera Orchestra in an afternoon of duets, arias, and more, performed by stars from San Francisco Opera’s 2026–27 Season.

subTitle: San Francisco Opera is taking opera out of the Opera House for Bohème Out of the Box. These free, live performances will travel to outdoor locations throughout the Bay Area this spring.
name: Opera Out of The Box
synopsis: San Francisco Opera is taking opera out of the Opera House for Bohème Out of the Box. These free, live performances will travel to outdoor locations throughout the Bay Area this spring.

subTitle: Secure your place at San Francisco's biggest fundraiser of the year, with proceeds supporting the future of opera and opera education in the Bay Area—ensuring the next 100 years of musical excellence.
name: Opera Ball
synopsis: Secure your place at San Francisco's biggest fundraiser of the year, with proceeds supporting the future of opera and opera education in the Bay Area—ensuring the next 100 years of musical excellence.
